name: Freaky Clown Town Mystery
author: Poki
description: Freaky Clown Mystery Escape is a horror adventure where a terrifying clown stalks the quiet town at night. Kids have gone missing, strange sightings haunt the neighborhood, and the mysterious “Freaky Clown” always escapes before anyone can catch him. Explore the town, uncover clues, and dive into the dark mystery surrounding Gumbo the Clown. Piece together the truth, face the fear, and reveal the identity behind the mask. Can you solve the mystery and stop the Freaky Clown? How to play Freaky Clown Town Mystery? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Freaky Clown Town Mystery? Freaky Clown Town Mystery is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure , Hide and Seek , Prankster 3D , Little Tricky Prankster , Pull the String , Scary Little Prankster , School's Out , Scary Teacher 3D , and School Escape! ! How can I play Freaky Clown Town Mystery for free? You can play Freaky Clown Town Mystery for free on Poki. Can I play Freaky Clown Town Mystery on mobile devices and desktop? Freaky Clown Town Mystery can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
